pr-evidence/ci-metadata-dependency-gates.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 focused review initially found that the governance test only checked substrings and did not enforce the exact CI command order. The test was tightened to assert the exact ordered run-command list, and follow-up review returned no remaining findings.
verification: GPT-5.5 follow-up review after resolving the governance-test finding
what_changed: Added CI steps that run poetry check before package installation, tests, and build.
Added CI dependency-resolution dry runs for the base dependency set and the optional databricks plus test dependency set.
Updated workflow documentation to describe the metadata and dependency-resolution gates.
Tightened the governance test to assert the exact ordered CI run-command list.
pr-evidence/ci-metadata-dependency-gates.why: The open-source package should fail CI when package metadata is invalid or optional dependency groups no longer resolve, before spending CI time on install, tests, or build.
